name: Umbral Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName]'s long tongue roughly dominates [TargetName]'s mouth as she lets out a smug laugh, and a sinful magic aura envelopes the two of you briefly as she siphons your mana for herself, her sweet saliva and seductive kiss leaving you light headed all the while.
miss: [AttackerName]'s long tongue roughly dominates [TargetName]'s mouth as she lets out a smug laugh, and a sinful magic aura envelopes the two of you briefly, but you manage to break the kiss long enough to disrupt the spell.
